subcodes.first_line: Praise be to Thee, O my God, in that Thou hast enabled me to recognize Him Who is the Orient of Thy Revelation and the Dayspring of Thy beauty
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل لک الحمد یا الهی بما عرفتنی مشرق وحیک و مطلع جمالک و ایدتنی علی الاقبال
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @presence of; reunion with God, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
